headline: APA (APA) Stock Looks Cheap Relative To Its Earnings Power
summary: APA stock has logged a 127.5% return over the past five years, and the current valuation checks still point to it screening cheap rather than stretched. That combination of a strong long run and a positive valuation read is drawing attention to whether the recent share price now fully reflects the risks and opportunities around the business. Over five years, APA has returned 127.5%, which puts the current share price in the spotlight as investors assess how much of the story is already...
